data.title: XLM expected to reach $0.47 in 2 weeks on improved technical setup, potentially breaking above $0.42 resistance.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Stellar (XLM) is anticipated to reach a price target of $0.47 within a two-week timeframe. The analysis suggests that a potential breakout above the $0.42 resistance level could ignite bullish momentum, pushing the price towards new highs for the year.

data.title: TRX price may hit $0.38 in 2 weeks despite headwinds. Analysts cautiously optimistic, foreseeing rally from bearish trend.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a potential rally for TRX, with the price forecasted to reach the $0.38 resistance level. Despite the current bearish momentum signals, experts remain cautiously optimistic about the future of TRON, highlighting a positive outlook for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov criticizes France for 'absurd' 2024 arrest, required to return every 14 days with no appeal.
data.description: Last year, Pavel Durov, the CEO of Telegram, was arrested and he now reveals that he is required to travel to France every 14 days without a set date for an appeal.

data.title: Dow rises over 800 points post Powell speech; Fear & Greed Index in 'Greed' zone. Stocks surge post Fed Chair's announcement on potential interest rate hike.
data.description: The latest data from the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicates an uptick in market sentiment, maintaining its position in the "Greed" zone at the end of the week. In the U.S., stocks experienced a positive trend on Friday, with the Dow Jones index surging by over 800 points in response to remarks made by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell at the annual Jackson Hole Symposium. Powell's speech hinted at an upcoming shift in the central bank's approach to interest rates, potentially occurring as soon as next month. However, Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) encountered a setback as its shares dropped by approximately 3% after publishing second-quarter results that missed expectations, along with issuing lower-than-anticipated sales guidance for the third quarter. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: TGS wins massive streamer contract in Indonesia, covering 10,000 sq km offshore.
data.description: A prominent energy data and intelligence provider, TGS, has recently secured a significant streamer contract in Indonesia's offshore region, encompassing roughly 10,000 square kilometers. The contract award was disclosed in Oslo, Norway, on 25th August 2025.

data.title: Tokenized RWAs have massive potential in $400T TradFi market, hitting all-time high value, say researchers.
data.description: The value of RWA tokenization has experienced a significant increase, reaching an all-time high. Researchers are optimistic about potential future growth, especially considering that Traditional Finance (TradFi) has an addressable market of approximately $400 trillion.

data.title: LG showcases energy-efficient commercial laundry solutions at Clean Show 2025 in Orlando to boost NA growth. SEOUL, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: A leading company from SEOUL, South Korea, LG Electronics, showcased its latest energy-efficient innovations at a prominent tradeshow in Orlando on Aug. 25, 2025. With a focus on boosting profitability and growth in the North American market, LG presented its advanced commercial laundry solutions at the Clean Show. The company aims to leverage these technologies to enhance its market presence and cater to the increasing demand for energy-efficient appliances. The event served as a platform for LG to highlight its commitment to sustainability and offer innovative solutions for businesses. This strategic move is expected to contribute significantly to LG's expansion plans in the region and reinforce its position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Elliptic Labs signs multi-year agreement with major laptop customer, solidifying commitment to deploy AI platform.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, Elliptic Labs has recently announced a significant development in the form of a multi-year agreement with one of its existing laptop customers. this agreement solidifies their commitment to implementing Elliptic Labs' AI Platform on a larger scale.
